title: anthyllis vulneraria var. font-queri
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. font-queri, also known as the Kidney Vetch or Sanguisorba alpina, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent effects, which are attributed to its high tannin content. The health benefits of Kidney Vetch include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it useful for treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and kidney stones. Kidney Vetch can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, or used topically as a poultice or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
